enGB: Dynamically kills weird add / remove of Arcane Weapon upgrades on Eldritch Scion
Bloodrager elemental bloodline elemental strikes now start always-on at level 1, and gain an on-critical burst effect at level 20
Adds missing Kineticist class feature - Internal Buffer
Changes Hexcrafter Arcana/Hex selection to a sub-selection of regular arcana selection that requires the hexcrafter archetype. This should permit more valid multi-archetypes.

Changes Armored Rider Feat Selection to a sub-selection of normal magus feat selection. This permits more multi-archetypes and improves mod compatibility in the event of Mounted Combat group feats that are not also Combat group feats. (Yes, that is the only case where Arcane Rider's altered feat selection actually does anything.
Adds 3pp Azata Sorcerer Bloodline. Requires TabletopTweaksCore for bloodline tooling.
Adds the Animal witch patron. Some deviation from tabletop to deal with unimplementable (speak with/charm animals) and unimplemented (antilife shell) spells.

Adds the Death witch patron, focusing on necromantic attack spells. Some deviation from tabletop to account for unimplmentable (speak with dead, rest eternal), unimplemented (suffocate, symbol of death) and just plain bad (power word kill) TT spells. 
  Expanded Content to be installed for Gloomblind Bolts.
Death Patron: Replace Blessing Of Courage And Life
Replaces TT Death level 2 : Blessing Of Courage and Life with Boneshaker to go all in on necromantic attack.

Adds the Plague witch patron, focusing on different necromantic nastiness. Some deviation from tabletop to account for unimplemented (detect undead, control undead, create greater undead), and just plain bad (giant vermin) TT spells. Kicks Create Undead up a level to slot in Plague Storm
Plague Patron: Replace Command Undead with Pernicious Poison
Follow Call Of The Wild's lead and swap Command Undead for Pernicious Poison on the Plague patron
Adds the Protection witch patron, focusing on defense spells. Some deviation from tabletop to account for most of the list being unimplemented, using CoTW list instead.

Adds the Light witch patron, focusing on light-themed crowd control and damage spells. Some deviation from tabletop to account for lack of detailed lighting system in game making dancing lantern, continual flame, and daylight unimplementable. Also swapped out Sirocco for Chains Of Light because seriously?
Moves stigmatized somewhat out of the suck by cancelling the patron removal. By default, this will give Ember the Endurance Patron when first met
If you have two witch patrons ex from TTT-Base Second patron, Winter Witch will progress both.
Gives Witch Spell features the icon of the spell.
Level 2 spell for many classes, targets area, blinds on failed save, dazzles on success, deals small damage to evil.
